baseScanUse.currentBlocker: BaseScan requested clearer project/team information and an official-domain sender/contact email. Tim Chen's official-domain professional profile is published; the 2026-05-27 public DNS snapshot still shows MX, SPF, and DMARC missing, with DKIM requiring the provider selector.
readyWhen: support@gcagochina.com can send authenticated external email
public website pages show the same domain email used in the BaseScan request

liveDnsSnapshot.nextAction: Create support@gcagochina.com at the mail provider, add MX/SPF/DMARC/DKIM records, rerun with --dkim-selector from the provider, then collect inbound and outbound email evidence.

dnsChecklist: Add provider MX records for gcagochina.com
Add or merge SPF TXT record for the chosen mail provider
Add DKIM TXT or CNAME records from the provider dashboard
Add DMARC TXT record at _dmarc.gcagochina.com, starting in monitoring mode if needed
Wait for DNS propagation and provider verification

mailProviderDecision.requirement: Use a full hosted mailbox or mail service that can receive external mail and send authenticated outbound mail as support@gcagochina.com.
mailProviderDecision.notEnoughByItself: Receive-only forwarding, including Cloudflare Email Routing by itself, is not enough for the next clean BaseScan resubmission because it does not prove outbound sender alignment.
acceptablePaths: Google Workspace if MX, SPF, DKIM, and DMARC records are configured and outbound replies show support@gcagochina.com
Microsoft 365 if the custom domain and required mail DNS records are configured and outbound replies show support@gcagochina.com
Zoho Mail if the custom domain, MX, SPF, DKIM, and DMARC records are configured and outbound replies show support@gcagochina.com
Another hosted mailbox provider if it satisfies the same inbound, outbound, SPF, DKIM, and DMARC evidence gates
mailProviderDecision.decisionRule: Pick the lowest-cost provider that gives a real mailbox UI or authenticated SMTP/API sending path for support@gcagochina.com; do not update public support or BaseScan values until inbound and outbound tests pass.

operatorProviderMatrixBuilder.purpose: Compare full-mailbox paths against receive-only or send-only options before buying an email plan, without fetching live prices or guessing DNS records.
operatorProviderMatrixBuilder.recommendedFirstCheck: Zoho Mail or an equivalent low-cost hosted mailbox, only if it creates support@gcagochina.com and provides MX, SPF, DKIM, and DMARC setup.
notEnoughAlone: send-only SMTP/API without inbound mail for support@gcagochina.com
boundaries: does not touch wallets or contracts

dnsEntryWorksheet.nameOrHost: @ or gcagochina.com, exactly as the DNS host expects.
dnsEntryWorksheet.valueSource: Copy the provider mail server host and priority from the provider dashboard; do not guess.
dnsEntryWorksheet.readyCheck: tools/check_domain_email_dns.py reports MX present for gcagochina.com.
dnsEntryWorksheet.commonMistake: Adding the MX record under support.gcagochina.com instead of the root domain.

dnsEntryWorksheet.purpose: Authorizes the chosen provider to send authenticated mail for gcagochina.com.
dnsEntryWorksheet.nameOrHost: @ or gcagochina.com, exactly as the DNS host expects.
dnsEntryWorksheet.valueSource: Copy the provider SPF string and merge it into the existing root-domain v=spf1 TXT record if one already exists.
dnsEntryWorksheet.readyCheck: tools/check_domain_email_dns.py reports a single SPF record.
dnsEntryWorksheet.commonMistake: Publishing multiple root-domain SPF TXT records instead of merging provider includes into one value.

dnsEntryWorksheet.purpose: Proves that outbound mail is signed by the provider.
dnsEntryWorksheet.type: TXT or CNAME, exactly as the provider requires.
dnsEntryWorksheet.nameOrHost: <provider-selector>._domainkey or the exact host shown by the provider.
dnsEntryWorksheet.valueSource: Copy the provider DKIM value and selector exactly; record the selector for --dkim-selector.
dnsEntryWorksheet.readyCheck: tools/check_domain_email_dns.py reports DKIM present when rerun with --dkim-selector <provider-selector>.
dnsEntryWorksheet.commonMistake: Using a guessed selector or omitting the _domainkey host segment when the provider requires it.

dnsEntryWorksheet.purpose: Publishes the domain mail policy for receiving mail systems.
dnsEntryWorksheet.valueSource: Start with the provider recommendation or monitoring mode such as v=DMARC1; p=none; until delivery is stable.
dnsEntryWorksheet.commonMistake: Adding DMARC at the root domain instead of _dmarc.gcagochina.com.

testChecklist: Send an inbound test from Gmail or Outlook to support@gcagochina.com
Reply from support@gcagochina.com to Gmail or Outlook
Confirm the visible sender is support@gcagochina.com
Confirm messages are not landing in spam during the first test
Archive test screenshots or message headers for owner records

activationEvidencePacket.purpose: Evidence to retain before the next clean BaseScan resubmission so sender email, website contact email, and domain ownership evidence are consistent.
requiredEvidence: Mail provider dashboard shows support@gcagochina.com as verified or active
DNS lookup confirms MX, SPF, DKIM, and DMARC records after propagation
Inbound test from Gmail or Outlook to support@gcagochina.com is received
Outbound reply from support@gcagochina.com to Gmail or Outlook shows the domain email as the visible sender
Updated support page shows the same domain email used in the BaseScan form

boundaries: does not touch wallets or contracts

operatorEvidencePacketBuilder.command: python3 tools/build_domain_email_evidence_packet.py --dkim-selector <provider-selector> --provider-active domain-email-provider-active.png --dns-proof domain-email-dns-mx-spf-dkim-dmarc.txt --inbound-test domain-email-inbound-test.png --outbound-test domain-email-outbound-test.png --support-page-proof support-page-domain-email.png --website-email-updated --output-json launch/domain_email_evidence_packet.json --output-md launch/domain_email_evidence_packet.md
readyRequires: readyForBaseScanEmailEvidence is true in the DNS check
website email has been switched to support@gcagochina.com
boundaries: does not touch wallets or contracts

operatorSwitchPlanBuilder.purpose: Find public site, launch, docs, and operator contact files that still reference GCAgochina@outlook.com before switching to support@gcagochina.com after activation.
runAfter: domain email evidence packet is ready
boundaries: does not touch wallets or contracts

doNotResubmitBefore: public website email has been updated to match the sender
activation evidence packet is archived for owner records
baseScanSubmissionPolicy.ifBaseScanAsksBeforeActivation: Reply with GCAgochina@outlook.com only as the current active contact and explain that support@gcagochina.com is still being activated; do not claim the domain mailbox is live.

safeClaims: GCA has published a domain email setup plan.
A working gcagochina.com domain email is still required before the next BaseScan token profile resubmission.
The current active public contact remains GCAgochina@outlook.com until domain email tests pass.
doNotClaim: support@gcagochina.com is active before inbound and outbound tests pass
BaseScan token profile approval before BaseScan publishes it
third-party audit completion before an independent report is published
